info.title: Value Fabric — Ground Truth Layer (L5)
info.description: Evidence-backed, CFO-defensible facts for the Value Fabric platform. Provides a validation state machine (extracted → supported → corroborated → approved), a 0–5 maturity ladder, and bidirectional integration with the Layer 3 Knowledge Graph.

post.description: Create a new evidence-backed factual claim in EXTRACTED state. If sources are provided and confidence meets the threshold, the object will automatically advance to SUPPORTED or CORROBORATED.

ModelEvaluationCreate.description: Schema for recording a model evaluation.

ModelEvaluationResponse.description: Schema for a ModelEvaluation in API responses.

cost_per_1k_input.title: Cost Per 1K Input
cost_per_1k_input.description: Cost per 1,000 input tokens in USD

cost_per_1k_output.title: Cost Per 1K Output
cost_per_1k_output.description: Cost per 1,000 output tokens in USD

is_default.title: Is Default
is_default.description: Whether this is the default model for the provider

ModelVersionCreate.description: Schema for registering a new ModelVersion.

ModelVersionResponse.title: ModelVersionResponse
ModelVersionResponse.description: Schema for a ModelVersion in API responses.

ModelVersionSummary.title: ModelVersionSummary
ModelVersionSummary.description: Summary view of a ModelVersion for list responses.

make_default.title: Make Default
make_default.description: Whether to make this the default model for the environment

PromoteModelRequest.title: PromoteModelRequest
PromoteModelRequest.description: Schema for promoting a model to an environment.

RollbackModelRequest.title: RollbackModelRequest
RollbackModelRequest.description: Schema for rolling back a deployment.

RollbackModelResponse.title: RollbackModelResponse
RollbackModelResponse.description: Response after rolling back a deployment.

claim.title: Claim
claim.description: Natural-language claim, e.g. "20 hrs/month reconciling invoices"
examples: Manual reporting costs 12 hours/week per analyst

value.title: Value
value.description: Structured value: {amount, unit, currency, period} e.g. {amount: 20, unit: 'hours', period: 'month'}

extraction_job_id.title: Extraction Job Id
extraction_job_id.description: Layer 2 extraction job that produced this claim

extraction_model.title: Extraction Model
extraction_model.description: LLM / model version used for extraction

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Initial evidence sources (optional — can be added later via POST /truths/{id}/sources)

TruthObjectCreate.title: TruthObjectCreate

TruthObjectResponse.title: TruthObjectResponse
TruthObjectResponse.description: Full TruthObject response including related sources and audit trail.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: URL or URI of the source document

source_date.title: Source Date
source_date.description: Date the source was published or captured

TruthSourceCreate.title: TruthSourceCreate
TruthSourceCreate.description: Schema for creating a new TruthSource.

source_url.title: Source Url
source_url.description: URL or URI of the source document

source_date.title: Source Date
source_date.description: Date the source was published or captured

TruthSourceResponse.title: TruthSourceResponse
TruthSourceResponse.description: Schema for a TruthSource in API responses.

TruthStatus.title: TruthStatus
TruthStatus.description:
Validation state machine — four ordered states.

Transitions (forward only, except DISPUTED which can revert):
  extracted → supported → corroborated → approved
                                       ↘ disputed (can revert to corroborated)

action.title: Action
action.description: Transition to apply: advance_supported | advance_corroborated | approve | dispute | resolve_dispute | operationalize

actor.title: Actor
actor.description: User ID or service name triggering the transition

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Optional notes for the audit trail

ValidateRequest.title: ValidateRequest
ValidateRequest.description:
Schema for POST /truths/{id}/validate — trigger a state transition.

action values:
  advance_supported     — EXTRACTED → SUPPORTED
  advance_corroborated  — SUPPORTED → CORROBORATED
  approve               — CORROBORATED → APPROVED (requires actor)
  dispute               — ANY → DISPUTED (requires dispute_reason)
  resolve_dispute       — DISPUTED → CORROBORATED
  operationalize        — APPROVED → maturity 5 (status stays APPROVED)

ValidationEventResponse.title: ValidationEventResponse
ValidationEventResponse.description: Schema for a ValidationEvent in API responses.

tags.name: ground-truth
tags.description: CRUD and validation operations for TruthObject records. All endpoints are scoped to an tenant_id for multi-tenancy.

tags.name: model-registry
tags.description: LLM model versioning, deployment, and evaluation tracking. Manages model lifecycles with cost attribution and canary releases.
